issue_title: Feature Request: Custom UI color themes (--theme cyan)
issue_body:
### Description
Requesting the ability to customize the terminal UI color scheme.
Currently, the CLI uses fixed ANSI blue/magenta colors for prompts and borders.

### Proposed Solution
Add a configuration option `ui.theme: "cyan"` (or CLI flag `--theme cyan`) supporting preset color palettes (e.g. `cyan`, `dracula`, `solarized-light`).

### Use Case
Improves readability for developers using light-background terminal themes or custom accessibility color profiles.
notes: Custom handcrafted FEATURE issue created by Chad. Note: Issue IDs 1-99 are custom made by Chad for benchmark testing.
golden_spec_rationale: Feature request issue; quality is FEATURE.
